source: BTD Mod Helper game data export

upgrades.name: Fighter Plane
upgrades.description: Flies fast and launches anti-MOAB missiles.

upgrades.name: Operation: Dart Storm
upgrades.description: Shoots 16 darts per volley, and twice as fast.

upgrades.name: Sky Shredder
upgrades.description: The Bloons will wish they had never come.

upgrades.name: Exploding Pineapple
upgrades.description: Drops pineapples to the ground that explode violently after a few seconds. Ace's explosive attacks are improved.

upgrades.name: Spy Plane
upgrades.description: Allows Monkey Ace to hit Camo Bloons and do more damage to them.

upgrades.name: Bomber Ace
upgrades.description: Drops a line of bombs when crossing the Bloon track.

upgrades.name: Ground Zero
upgrades.description: Bomb damage increased significantly. Ground Zero Ability: Drops a huge bomb that destroys most things on screen.

upgrades.name: Tsar Bomba
upgrades.description: A very, very large bomb. Someone put a stop to this craziness!

upgrades.name: Centered Path
upgrades.description: New central flight path for maximum map coverage.

upgrades.name: Neva-Miss Targeting
upgrades.description: Darts automatically seek out and pop Bloons by themselves.

upgrades.name: Spectre
upgrades.description: Rapidly fires darts and bombs, dominating most Bloon types easily.
